"Don't just pay for a service — invest in students building their future."
When you hire JL Junk Removal, you're not giving money to a national chain. You're helping real college students pay for school — from NC State to UNC Chapel Hill to FSU and beyond. Reliable service with a mission behind it.

Jake — Founder & Owner NC State · Electrical Engineering

Our Story
Built From the Ground Up

My name is Jake. I'm a 19-year-old Electrical Engineering student at NC State, and I started JL Junk Removal & Demo to solve two problems at once: give hardworking college students meaningful work, and provide honest, dependable junk removal to the Asheville community.

Every person on my crew is a college student earning money for the upcoming school year. We're not here to coast — we're here to build something. That work ethic shows in every job we take on.

My mission is to create meaningful work opportunities that help students afford college while providing honest, dependable service to our community.

Our crew represents schools from across the Carolinas and beyond:

Colleges on the crew
NC State ⚙️ UNC Chapel Hill UNC Charlotte UNC Wilmington Wofford Piedmont FSU

When you call JL, you're supporting all of them. We appreciate it more than you know.

What We Do
Our Services
🏠

Residential Junk Removal

Furniture, appliances, electronics, yard waste — we clear it all from your home, garage, or attic.

🏗️

Demolition Services

Sheds, decks, fences, interior demo — we knock it down, break it up, and haul it away clean.

🏢

Commercial Cleanouts

Office cleanouts, retail spaces, storage units — we work around your schedule.

🚛

Estate & Foreclosure Cleanouts

Full-property cleanouts handled with care and discretion. Left broom-clean.

🌿

Yard & Debris Removal

Brush, storm debris, old landscaping, dirt, concrete — heavy outdoor loads welcome.

♻️

Responsible Disposal

We donate, recycle, and properly dispose so as little as possible ends up in the landfill.
